title: No Chat Restrictions
description: Restores access to game chat for all accounts
body:
[![Fast Client Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e81436885d7d199d80ffde632b0895d24a2c72b.png)](https://fastclient.net/aizistral)

This mod is dedicated to the removal of restrictions around the use of multiplayer features, in particular the in-game chat. It unblocks chat and other features that may otherwise be impossible to use with your Minecraft account.

As of **1.16.4**, along with the introduction of Social Interactions screen, vanilla Minecraft client may now prevent access to multiplayer menu or in-game chat based on Minecraft account flags, which are controlled by **Mojang/Microsoft** and may be enabled or disabled for any reason. This mod simply reverts that change, letting all multiplayer features be accessed exactly like they could be in **1.16.3** and prior.

These restrictions are enforced only on the client side, and as such this mod needs to be installed only on the client in order for it to work (though this might change in future Minecraft versions).

**No Chat Restrictions now covers 100% of all Minecraft versions affected by multiplayer restrictions.** No matter which Minecraft version you play, there is a mod version compatible with it.

Join my **Discord** server to discuss this mod in [#no-chat-restrictions](https://discord.com/channels/757941072449241128/1465785682151735319) channel: https://discord.com/invite/xtfXsJAPhz

You can also watch my **YouTube** video for some relevant context surrounding this mod:
